zh.lifeSummary: Janet Ogilvy of Inchmartin是Sir Andrew Ogilvy of Inchmartine和Marjorie Glen的女兒，出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾音圖。她和Sir Michael Balfour of Montquhanie and Strathor至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1533年在英國蘇格蘭費伏。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Ogilvy of Inchmartin was born in Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Andrew Ogilvy of Inchmartine and Marjorie Glen. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sir Michael Balfour of Montquhanie and Strathor. She died in 1533, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sir Michael Balfour of Montquhanie and Strathor. Elle est décédée en 1533, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Ogilvy of InchmartinはイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアインチトゥアでSir Andrew Ogilvy of InchmartineとMarjorie Glenの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Michael Balfour of Montquhanie and Strathorとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1533年にイギリススコットランドフィフで死去した。

ko.Rothesay, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 로트지
ko.lifeSummary: Janet Ogilvy of Inchmartin(은)는 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 인ch처에서 Sir Andrew Ogilvy of Inchmartine(와)과 Marjorie Glen의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Michael Balfour of Montquhanie and Strathor(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 사망했다.
